tools.name: applications.createApplication
tools.description: Creates an application, optionally including an AWS SAM file to create the first application version in the same call.

tools.name: applications.createCloudFormationChangeSet
tools.description: Creates an AWS CloudFormation change set for the given application.

tools.name: applications.getApplicationPolicy
tools.description: Retrieves the policy for the application.

tools.name: applications.getCloudFormationTemplate
tools.description: Gets the specified AWS CloudFormation template.

tools.name: applications.listApplicationDependencies
tools.description: Retrieves the list of applications nested in the containing application.

tools.name: applications.listApplications
tools.description: Lists applications owned by the requester.

tools.name: applications.listApplicationVersions
tools.description: Lists versions for the specified application.

tools.name: applications.putApplicationPolicy
tools.description: Sets the permission policy for an application. For the list of actions supported for this operation, see Application Permissions .

tools.name: applications.unshareApplication
tools.description:
Unshares an application from an AWS Organization.

This operation can be called only from the organization's master account.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
